jobs.name: opportunity-os-daily
jobs.description: [managed-by:opportunity-os/v1] Daily discovery; OpenClaw owns scheduling, retry, delivery and failure alerts.
jobs.message: Run the installed opportunity-os CLI exactly once with: opportunity-os automation run --home /Users/liujun/.hermes/profiles/opportunity-discovery/opportunity-os --cadence daily --period-key <today in Asia/Shanghai as YYYY-MM-DD> --format json. The period key is the only computed argument. Do not retry inside the task. If the exec exits non-zero, fail the Cron task: do not convert the error into a successful summary and do not swallow it. On success, return a concise Chinese summary of fresh signals, stable guidance, contrary evidence, and one unexpected cross-domain finding.

jobs.name: opportunity-os-weekly
jobs.description: [managed-by:opportunity-os/v1] Weekly review; OpenClaw owns scheduling, retry, delivery and failure alerts.
jobs.message: Run the installed opportunity-os CLI exactly once with: opportunity-os automation run --home /Users/liujun/.hermes/profiles/opportunity-discovery/opportunity-os --cadence weekly --period-key <current ISO week in Asia/Shanghai as YYYY-Www> --format json. The period key is the only computed argument. Do not retry inside the task. If the exec exits non-zero, fail the Cron task: do not convert the error into a successful summary and do not swallow it. On success, return a concise Chinese summary of 3-5 opportunity cards, supporting and contrary evidence, and one low-cost experiment proposal; do not take external action.

jobs.name: opportunity-os-healthcheck
jobs.description: [managed-by:opportunity-os/v1] Thin aggregate probes; OpenClaw native failure alerts notify IM on non-zero exit.
jobs.message: Run the installed opportunity-os CLI exactly once with: opportunity-os healthcheck --home /Users/liujun/.hermes/profiles/opportunity-discovery/opportunity-os --format json. Do not retry, restart, send messages, or enqueue anything inside the task. If the exec exits non-zero, fail the Cron task: do not convert the error into a successful summary and do not swallow it. Preserve the process exit status so OpenClaw native failure alerts handle notification.
